title: Metadata Extraction Component
author: Cedeño, Erick
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This project aims to process administrative and legal documents in text format, especially those known as "Pliegos de cláusulas administrativas", to automatically extract the following metadata: 
  Award criteria  
  Solvency criteria  
  Special conditions for contract execution  
 To perform these tasks, large language models (LLMs), such as OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini, integrated through LangChain, and embeddings generated through OpenAI Embeddings, are used. In addition, a vector database (FAISS) is used to improve the retrieval of relevant information within the document prior to final model inference.
steps_raw:
This project aims to process administrative and legal documents in text format, especially those known as "Pliegos de cláusulas administrativas", to automatically extract the following metadata: 
  Award criteria  
  Solvency criteria  
  Special conditions for contract execution  
 To perform these tasks, large language models (LLMs), such as OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini, integrated through LangChain, and embeddings generated through OpenAI Embeddings, are used. In addition, a vector database (FAISS) is used to improve the retrieval of relevant information within the document prior to final model inference.
